emails.subject: Allegheny Energy ETA
emails.body: Allegheny Energy ETA Tana: Please prepare a letter agreement amending the terms of the ETA for Allegheny Energy Supply Company, LLC. (You can call Pat Clark, their attorney, at 724-838-6217 if you need the address of this CP.) The following should be included in the ETA, to the standard form of this agreement: 1. Section 1 of the ETA is hereby amended by inserting the words "executed by the Parties" following the phrase "(i) master agreement or agreements or other written agreements." 2. Section 2(b) of the ETA is hereby amended by inserting the phrase "subject to the terms of any confidentiality provisions set forth in this Agreement, including Section 5, or in any master agreement or the GTC entered into between theh Parties with respect to any Transaction" at the end thereof. Let me know if you have any questions. Thanks, Leslie

emails.subject: Re: Allegheny Energy ETA
emails.body: Tana: What's the status of this ETA letter agreement. I just got an e-mail from the Allegheny attorney, and she has apparently not received. I'll forward you her e-mail if you wouldn't mind responding with the status. Leslie Forwarded by Leslie Hansen/HOU/ECT on 08/16/2000 08:18 AM Leslie Hansen 08/01/2000 09:23 AM

emails.body: Unbeknownst to me, it had been returned to me and was buried under stacks of papers on my desk. I'll get it out today. Leslie Hansen 08/16/2000 08:19 AM
